parsed_output.justification: Justin’s statements are inconsistent and he repeatedly claims to be the Tanner, yet several players (Mike, Paul) accuse him of being a werewolf. His claim that he saw a werewolf in the center contradicts the fact that the center had only one werewolf, implying he may have been lying about his role. The pattern of deception fits a werewolf trying to deflect suspicion. Therefore, voting Justin maximizes the chance of eliminating a werewolf.
